quote: paths like `transformers.tokenization_utils` and `transformers.tokenization_utils_fast`, which no longer exist. These now redirect to `transformers.tokenization_utils_sentencepiece` and `transformers.tokenization_utils_tokenizers` respectively; please update imports accordingly.

subject: transformers.tokenization_utils_fast module
truth: Stop importing from transformers.tokenization_utils_fast; use transformers.tokenization_utils_tokenizers instead.
quote: paths like `transformers.tokenization_utils` and `transformers.tokenization_utils_fast`, which no longer exist. These now redirect to `transformers.tokenization_utils_sentencepiece` and `transformers.tokenization_utils_tokenizers` respectively; please update imports accordingly.

subject: tensor parallelism and expert parallelism with MoE
old: tensor parallelism and expert parallelism worked with MoE
truth: Tensor parallelism and expert parallelism are not working as expected with MoE; do not rely on them until a fix is released.
quote: tensor parallelism and expert parallelism aren't working as expected.

from_fact: tensor parallelism and expert parallelism worked with moe

subject: safe_serialization parameter
truth: Stop passing safe_serialization=False to save_pretrained or push_to_hub; it is no longer supported.
quote: The `safe_serialization` parameter has been removed from all `save_pretrained` and `push_to_hub` methods.

subject: default shard size
truth: The default shard size for saving model weights changed from 5GB to 50GB, so models that previously split into many shards may now produce fewer/larger files.
quote: The default shard size went up from `5GB` to `50GB`.

subject: use_auth_token parameter
truth: Replace all uses of `use_auth_token` with `token` in every API call.
quote: The `use_auth_token` argument/parameter is deprecated in favor of `token` everywhere.

subject: head masking feature
truth: Stop using head masking (turning off certain heads during attention calculation) as it is removed in v5.
quote: This feature allowed to turn off certain heads during the attention calculation and only worked for eager.

subject: relative positional biases in Bert-like models
old: relative positional biases in Bert-like models
truth: Stop using relative positional biases in Bert-like models as this feature is removed in v5.
quote: No more relative positional biases in Bert-like models, see [#41170](https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/pull/41170).

from_fact: relative positional biases in bert-like models

subject: head pruning feature
truth: Stop using head pruning (pruning heads within attention layers) as it is removed in v5.
quote: As the name suggests, it allowed to prune heads within your attention layers.

subject: torchscript support
truth: Stop using torchscript with transformers as support has been dropped; use dynamo or export instead.
quote: We introduce a new weight loading API in `transformers`, which significantly improves on the previous API.

subject: torch.fx support
truth: Stop using torch.fx with transformers as support has been dropped; use dynamo or export instead.
quote: We dropped support for two torch APIs:

subject: get_text_features, get_image_features, get_audio_features, get_video_features return type
old: returned a pooled embedding tensor directly
truth: Access the pooled embedding via `.pooler_output` on the returned BaseModelOutputWithPooling instead of using the return value directly as a tensor.
quote: Starting with v5, these 4 helper methods now return a `BaseModelOutputWithPooling` (or a subclass) instead of only a pooled embedding tensor

from_fact: returned a pooled embedding tensor directly

subject: load_in_4bit argument
truth: Stop using `load_in_4bit` and use `quantization_config` with `BitsAndBytesConfig(load_in_4bit=True)` instead.
quote: quantization_config = BitsAndBytesConfig(load_in_4bit=True)

subject: AutoModelWithLMHead
truth: Stop using `AutoModelWithLMHead` and use `AutoModelForCausalLM`, `AutoModelForMaskedLM`, or `AutoModelForSeq2SeqLM` instead.
quote: `AutoModelWithLMHead` is removed in favor of `AutoModelForCausalLM` for causal language models, `AutoModelForMaskedLM` for masked language models and `AutoModelForSeq2SeqLM` for encoder-decoder models

subject: AutoModelForVision2Seq
truth: Stop using `AutoModelForVision2Seq` and use `AutoModelForImageTextToText` instead.
quote: `AutoModelForVision2Seq` is removed in favor of `AutoModelForImageTextToText`

subject: from_xxx_config methods on configs
truth: Stop using `from_xxx_config` methods to init nested configs; use the `__init__` method instead.
quote: Methods to init a nested config such as `from_xxx_config` are deleted. Configs can be init from the `__init__` method in the same way.

subject: loading config from URL
old: loading config from a URL file
new: loading config from local path or Hub repo only
truth: Configs can no longer be loaded from a URL file; they must be loaded from a local path or a repo on the Hub.
quote: It is no longer possible to load a config class from a URL file. Configs must be loaded from either a local path or a repo on the Hub.

from_fact: loading config from a url file
loading config from local path or hub repo only

subject: rope_theta and rope_type config attributes
truth: Stop accessing `config.rope_theta` directly; rotary embedding params are now under `config.rope_parameters` dict and accessing `config.rope_theta` will throw an AttributeError.
quote: All parameters for configuring model's rotary embedding are now stored under `mode.rope_parameters`, including the `rope_theta` and `rope_type`.

subject: Qwen-VL config key access
truth: Qwen-VL family config is now nested; accessing keys like `config.vocab_size` directly will throw an error. Use sub-configs like `config.text_config.vocab_size`.
quote: Qwen-VL family configuration is in a nested format and trying to access keys directly will throw an error (e.g. `config.vocab_size`). Users are expected to access keys from their respective sub-configs (`config.text_config.vocab_size`).

subject: generation_config on non-generative models
truth: Configs of non-generative models (models that don't call `model.generate()`) no longer have a `generation_config`; accessing `model.config.generation_config` will throw an AttributeError.
quote: Configurations of non-generative models (any model that doesn't call `model.generate()`) will no longer have a `generation_config` and `model.config.generation_config` will throw an attribute error.

subject: slow tokenizer files
truth: Slow tokenizer files (`tokenization_<model>.py`) are removed; use fast tokenizer files (`tokenization_<model>_fast.py` renamed to `tokenization_<model>.py`).
quote: Slow tokenizer files (aka: `tokenization_<model>.py` ) will be removed in favor of using fast tokenizer files `tokenization_<model>_fast.py` --> will be renamed to `tokenization_<model>.py`.

subject: special_tokens_map.json and added_tokens.json
truth: Legacy files `special_tokens_map.json` and `added_tokens.json` are removed.
quote: Remove legacy files like special_tokens_map.json and added_tokens.json

subject: _eventually_correct_t5_max_length
truth: The `_eventually_correct_t5_max_length` function/method is removed.
quote: Remove _eventually_correct_t5_max_length

subject: encode_plus method
truth: Stop using `tokenizer.encode_plus()` and use `tokenizer()` (i.e. `__call__`) instead.
quote: `encode_plus` --> `__call__`

subject: batch_decode method
truth: Stop using `tokenizer.batch_decode()` and use `tokenizer.decode()` instead.
quote: `batch_decode` --> `decode`

subject: apply_chat_template return type
truth: `apply_chat_template` now returns a `BatchEncoding` dict instead of naked `input_ids`.
quote: `apply_chat_template` by default returns naked `input_ids` rather than a `BatchEncoding` dict.

subject: processor config serialization
old: attributes serialized in their own config files
new: attributes serialized under processor_config.json as a nested dict
truth: Stop relying on separate config files per attribute; all processor attributes are now serialized as a nested dict inside processor_config.json.
quote: In processing classes each attribute will be serialized under `processor_config.json` as a nested dict, instead of serializing attributes in their own config files.

from_fact: attributes serialized in their own config files
attributes serialized under processor_config.json as a nested dict

subject: XXXFeatureExtractors classes
truth: Stop using XXXFeatureExtractors classes; they are completely removed and you must use XXXImageProcessor instead for all vision models.
quote: `XXXFeatureExtractors` classes are completely removed in favor of `XXXImageProcessor` class for all vision models

subject: XXXFastImageProcessorKwargs
truth: Stop using XXXFastImageProcessorKwargs; it is removed and you must use XXXImageProcessorKwargs which is shared between fast and slow processors.
quote: `XXXFastImageProcessorKwargs` is removed in favor of `XXXImageProcessorKwargs` which will be shared between fast and slow processors

subject: use_fast parameter
truth: Stop using use_fast parameter; use backend='torchvision' or backend='pil' instead when calling AutoImageProcessor.from_pretrained.
quote: The `use_fast` parameter is deprecated. Use `backend` instead

subject: is_fast property
truth: Stop using processor.is_fast; use processor.backend == 'torchvision' to check if the torchvision backend is active.
quote: Use `processor.backend == "torchvision"` instead of `processor.is_fast`.

subject: AutoImageProcessor.register() API
truth: Stop using slow_image_processor_class and fast_image_processor_class parameters in AutoImageProcessor.register(); use image_processor_classes={'pil': ..., 'torchvision': ...} instead.
quote: `slow_image_processor_class` and `fast_image_processor_class` are deprecated in favor of an `image_processor_classes` dict

subject: RotaryEmbeddings layers
new: returning a dict of tuples (cos, sin) per RoPE type
truth: RotaryEmbeddings layers now return a dict of tuples (cos, sin) per RoPE type instead of direct values.
quote: Some `RotaryEmbeddings` layers will start returning a dict of tuples, in case the model uses several RoPE configurations (Gemma2, ModernBert). Each value will be a tuple of "cos, sin" per RoPE type.

from_fact: returning a dict of tuples (cos, sin) per rope type

subject: Config attribute for RotaryEmbeddings
truth: Stop accessing rope_theta directly on config; use config.rope_parameters['rope_theta'] instead.
quote: Config attribute for `RotaryEmbeddings` layer will be unified and accessed via `config.rope_parameters`. Config attr for `rope_theta` might not be accessible anymore for some models, and instead will be in `config.rope_parameters['rope_theta']`.

subject: Shortcut access model.language_model on Vision Language models
truth: Stop using model.language_model on Vision Language models; use model.model.language_model or model.get_decoder() instead.
quote: Vision Language models will not have a shortcut access to its language and vision component from the generative model via `model.language_model`. It is recommended to either access the module with `model.model.language_model` or `model.get_decoder()`.

subject: Old deprecated output type aliases in generate
truth: Stop using old output type aliases like GreedySearchEncoderDecoderOutput; use the 4 remaining output classes (decoder-only vs encoder-decoder, with/without beams).
quote: Old, deprecated output type aliases were removed (e.g. `GreedySearchEncoderDecoderOutput`). We now only have 4 output classes built from the following matrix: decoder-only vs encoder-decoder, uses beams vs doesn't use beams

subject: Deprecated classes for constraints and beam scores
truth: Stop using deprecated constraints and beam scores classes that were moved to the Hub.
quote: Removed deprecated classes regarding decoding methods that were moved to the Hub due to low usage (constraints and beam scores)

subject: Default cache class in generate
truth: When generate receives no KV Cache argument, the default cache class is now defined by the model, not always DynamicCache.
quote: If `generate` doesn't receive any KV Cache argument, the default cache class used is now defined by the model (as opposed to always being `DynamicCache`)

subject: Generation parameters access
truth: Stop accessing generation parameters via model.config; use model.generation_config instead.
quote: Generation parameters are no longer accessible via model's config. If generation parameters are serialized in `config.json` for any old model, it will be loaded back into model's generation config. Users are expected to access or modify generation parameters only with `model.generation_config.do_sample = True`.

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `overwrite_output_dir` in TrainingArguments; use `resume_from_checkpoint` instead.
quote: `overwrite_output_dir` - > replaced by `resume_from_checkpoint` and it was only used in examples script, no impact on Trainer.

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `logging_dir` in TrainingArguments; set the `TENSORBOARD_LOGGING_DIR` environment variable instead.
quote: `logging_dir` -> only used for tensorboard, set `TENSORBOARD_LOGGING_DIR` env var instead

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `jit_mode_eval` in TrainingArguments; use `use_torch_compile` instead as torchscript is not recommended anymore.
quote: `jit_mode_eval` -> use `use_torch_compile` instead as torchscript is not recommended anymore

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `tpu_num_cores` in TrainingArguments; set the `TPU_NUM_CORES` environment variable instead.
quote: `tpu_num_cores`-> It is actually better to remove it as it is not recommended to set the number of cores. By default, all tpu cores are used . Set `TPU_NUM_CORES` env var instead

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `ray_scope` in TrainingArguments; set the `RAY_SCOPE` environment variable instead.
quote: `ray_scope` -> only for a minor arg for ray integration. Set `RAY_SCOPE` var env instead

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `warmup_ratio` in TrainingArguments; use `warmup_step` instead, which now accepts float values.
quote: `warmup_ratio` -> use `warmup_step` instead. We combined both args together by allowing passing float values in `warmup_step`.

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `fsdp_min_num_params` and `fsdp_transformer_layer_cls_to_wrap` in TrainingArguments; use `fsdp_config` instead.
quote: `fsdp_min_num_params` and `fsdp_transformer_layer_cls_to_wrap` -> use `fsdp_config`

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `tpu_metrics_debug` in TrainingArguments; use `debug` instead.
quote: `tpu_metrics_debug` -> `debug`

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `push_to_hub_token` in TrainingArguments; use `hub_token` instead.
quote: `push_to_hub_token` -> `hub_token`

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `push_to_hub_model_id` and `push_to_hub_organization` in TrainingArguments; use `hub_model_id` instead.
quote: `push_to_hub_model_id` and `push_to_hub_organization` -> `hub_model_id`

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `include_inputs_for_metrics` in TrainingArguments; use `include_for_metrics` instead.
quote: `include_inputs_for_metrics` -> `include_for_metrics`

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `per_gpu_train_batch_size` in TrainingArguments; use `per_device_train_batch_size` instead.
quote: `per_gpu_train_batch_size` -> `per_device_train_batch_size`

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `per_gpu_eval_batch_size` in TrainingArguments; use `per_device_eval_batch_size` instead.
quote: `per_gpu_eval_batch_size` -> `per_device_eval_batch_size`

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `use_mps_device` in TrainingArguments; MPS will be used automatically if detected.
quote: `use_mps_device` -> mps will be used by default if detected

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `fp16_backend` and `half_precision_backend` in TrainingArguments; rely on torch.amp instead.
quote: `fp16_backend` and `half_precision_backend` -> we will only rely on torch.amp as everything has been upstream to torch

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `no_cuda` in TrainingArguments; use `use_cpu` instead.
quote: `no_cuda` -> `use_cpu`

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `include_tokens_per_second` in TrainingArguments; use `include_num_input_tokens_seen` instead.
quote: `include_tokens_per_second` -> `include_num_input_tokens_seen`

subject: TrainingArguments
truth: Stop using `use_legacy_prediction_loop` in TrainingArguments; only `evaluation_loop` is used from now on.
quote: `use_legacy_prediction_loop` -> we only use `evaluation_loop` function from now on

subject: Trainer.__init__
truth: Stop passing `tokenizer` to Trainer.__init__; pass `processing_class` instead.
quote: `tokenizer` in initialization -> `processing_class`

subject: Trainer.train()
truth: Stop passing `model_path` to Trainer.train(); pass `resume_from_checkpoint` instead.
quote: `model_path` in train() -> `resume_from_checkpoint`

subject: Trainer
truth: SigOpt integration for hyperparameter search has been removed from Trainer.
quote: sigpot integration for hp search was removed as the library was archived + the api stopped working

subject: Trainer
truth: Support for sagemaker API versions below 1.10 has been dropped.
quote: drop support for sagemaker API <1.10

subject: Trainer
truth: Minimum accelerate version has been bumped to 1.1.0.
quote: bump accelerate minimum version to 1.1.0

subject: Trainer
old: use_cache defaults to True in model config
new: use_cache defaults to False in model config
truth: The `use_cache` model config now defaults to `False` instead of `True`. Override via TrainingArguments `use_cache` if needed.
quote: `use_cache` in the model config will be set to `False`. You can still change the cache value through `TrainingArguments` `use_cache` argument if needed.

from_fact: use_cache defaults to true in model config
use_cache defaults to false in model config

subject: pipelines
truth: The `question-answering` pipeline has been removed. Use `TextGenerationPipeline` with a chat model instead.
quote: `question-answering` and `Text2TextGenerationPipeline`, including its related `SummarizationPipeline` and `TranslationPipeline`, were deprecated and will now be removed.

subject: pipelines
truth: The `Text2TextGenerationPipeline`, `SummarizationPipeline`, and `TranslationPipeline` have been removed. Use `TextGenerationPipeline` with a chat model instead.
quote: `Text2TextGenerationPipeline`, including its related `SummarizationPipeline` and `TranslationPipeline`, were deprecated and will now be removed.

subject: image-to-text pipeline
truth: Stop using the image-to-text pipeline; use the image-text-to-text pipeline with a vision-language chat model instead.
quote: the `image-to-text` and `visual-question-answering` pipelines have been removed

subject: visual-question-answering pipeline
truth: Stop using the visual-question-answering pipeline; use the image-text-to-text pipeline with a vision-language chat model instead.
quote: the `image-to-text` and `visual-question-answering` pipelines have been removed

subject: image-to-image pipeline
truth: Stop using the image-to-image pipeline; use 🤗 Diffusers for image generation tasks instead.
quote: The `image-to-image` pipeline has been removed

subject: image-text-to-text pipeline image input
old: passing images as a separate argument alongside conversation chats
new: images must be embedded in the chat's content field
truth: Image-text-to-text pipelines no longer accept images as a separate argument; image data must be embedded in the chat's content field.

images must be embedded in the chat's content field

subject: PushToHubMixin organization parameter
truth: Stop using the organization parameter in PushToHubMixin; pass a repo_id instead.
quote: removed deprecated `organization` and `repo_url` from `PushToHubMixin`. You must pass a `repo_id` instead.

subject: PushToHubMixin repo_url parameter
truth: Stop using the repo_url parameter in PushToHubMixin; pass a repo_id instead.
quote: removed deprecated `organization` and `repo_url` from `PushToHubMixin`. You must pass a `repo_id` instead.

subject: PushToMixin ignore_metadata_errors parameter
truth: Stop using ignore_metadata_errors in PushToMixin; it has been removed because ignoring metadata errors prevents pushing the model card back to the Hub.
quote: removed `ignore_metadata_errors` from `PushToMixin`. In practice if we ignore errors while loading the model card, we won't be able to push the card back to the Hub so it's better to fail early and not provide the option to fail later.

subject: push_to_hub **kwargs
new: push_to_hub only accepts explicitly documented parameters
truth: push_to_hub no longer accepts **kwargs; only explicitly documented parameters are accepted.
quote: `push_to_hub` do not accept `**kwargs` anymore. All accepted parameters are explicitly documented.

from_fact: push_to_hub only accepts explicitly documented parameters

subject: push_to_hub argument style
truth: push_to_hub arguments are now keyword-only except for repo_id; passing other arguments positionally will break.
quote: arguments of `push_to_hub` are now keyword-only to avoid confusion. Only `repo_id` can be positional since it's the main arg.

subject: push_to_hub use_temp_dir parameter
truth: Stop using the use_temp_dir argument in push_to_hub; a temp directory is now always used.
quote: removed `use_temp_dir` argument from `push_to_hub`. We now use a tmp dir in all cases.

subject: transformers-cli command
truth: Stop using the transformers-cli command; use the transformers command instead as the only CLI entry point.
quote: The deprecated `transformers-cli ...` command was deprecated, `transformers ...` is now the only CLI entry point.

old: transformers chat could start a Chat Completion server and chat with it

subject: transformers run command
truth: Stop using `transformers run` or `transformers-cli run`; it has been removed.

truth: Stop using `PYTORCH_TRANSFORMERS_CACHE`; use `HF_HOME` instead.
quote: Legacy environment variables like `TRANSFORMERS_CACHE`, `PYTORCH_TRANSFORMERS_CACHE`, and `PYTORCH_PRETRAINED_BERT_CACHE` have been removed. Please use `HF_HOME` instead.

truth: Stop using `PYTORCH_PRETRAINED_BERT_CACHE`; use `HF_HOME` instead.

subject: HUGGINGFACE_CO_EXAMPLES_TELEMETRY constant
truth: Stop using `HUGGINGFACE_CO_EXAMPLES_TELEMETRY`; use `huggingface_hub.constants.ENDPOINT` instead.

subject: HUGGINGFACE_CO_PREFIX constant
truth: Stop using `HUGGINGFACE_CO_PREFIX`; use `huggingface_hub.constants.ENDPOINT` instead.
quote: Constants `HUGGINGFACE_CO_EXAMPLES_TELEMETRY`, `HUGGINGFACE_CO_EXAMPLES_TELEMETRY`, `HUGGINGFACE_CO_PREFIX`, and `HUGGINGFACE_CO_RESOLVE_ENDPOINT` have been removed. Please use `huggingface_hub.constants.ENDPOINT` instead.

subject: HUGGINGFACE_CO_RESOLVE_ENDPOINT constant
truth: Stop using `HUGGINGFACE_CO_RESOLVE_ENDPOINT`; use `huggingface_hub.constants.ENDPOINT` instead.

subject: HTTP backend
truth: Stop catching `requests.HTTPError`; catch `httpx.HTTPError` instead, because the HTTP backend switched from requests to httpx.
quote: switched the HTTP backend from `requests` to `httpx`. This change was made to improve performance and to support both synchronous and asynchronous requests the same way. If you are currently catching `requests.HTTPError` errors in your codebase, you'll need to switch to `httpx.HTTPError`.

subject: proxy configuration
truth: Stop setting proxies programmatically from your script; set `HTTP_PROXY` and `HTTPS_PROXY` environment variables instead.
quote: it is not possible to set proxies from your script. To handle proxies, you must set the `HTTP_PROXY` / `HTTPS_PROXY` environment variables

subject: hf_transfer / HF_HUB_ENABLE_HF_TRANSFER
truth: Stop using `hf_transfer` or `HF_HUB_ENABLE_HF_TRANSFER`; they have been dropped in favor of `hf_xet`.
quote: `hf_transfer` and therefore `HF_HUB_ENABLE_HF_TRANSFER` have been completed dropped in favor of `hf_xet`.
